title: metastelma guilleminianum
intro: Metastelma guilleminianum, also known as Guillemin's Metastelma, is a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family. It is a climbing plant native to Madagascar, used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's health benefits include its ability to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its richness in flavonoids and other compounds. Metastelma guilleminianum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and its leaves can also be used to make poultices for topical applications.
